# EduTalk AI

> AI-powered sentence and dialogue generator that helps students form grammatically correct sentences, build dialogues, and learn from images.

EduTalk AI combines NLP and image analysis to assist learners and educators in
language learning. Students set parameters (noun, verb, tense, gender, topic)
or upload an image, and the system produces accurate, pedagogically annotated
sentences and dialogues.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Product overview, features, pricing.
- [Workbench](/workbench): Interactive sentence, dialogue, and image-to-sentence generator.
